bad_morale_taliban.description: Knowing the odds are against them, and the enemies superior technology and training, these soldiers are gloomy and hopeless.

bad_morale_us.description: These soldiers are not sure why they are here. They have seen unspeakable things and just want to get home.

tusk2.description: This vehicle has been supplied with the Tank Urban Survival Kit 2nd Generation, which increases the general survivability in urban combat environments drastically.

terrain_knowledge.description: This unit has exceptional knowledge about the terrain, having memorized most major and even minor landmarks, it can navigate faster, find better defensive positions and more effective angles of attack.

cover_light.description: Some light cover gained from terrain or dug in positions.

cover_medium.description: Good cover from terrain, foliage or shallow fortifications.

cover_heavy.description: Excellent cover from structures or dense terrain.

suppressed.description: Unit is pinned and less effective at fighting.
